metadata.title: MeetingCost.team - Real-Time Meeting Cost Calculator
metadata.description: Calculate how much your meetings really cost in real-time. Track meeting expenses based on attendee hourly rates and improve productivity.

header.title: MeetingCost
header.tagline: See what your meetings really cost

info.step1: Enter name, hourly rate, and currency for each person
info.step2: Click + to add them to the meeting
info.step3: Each person can have a different rate and currency
info.step4: Hit Start and watch each person's cost tick up in real-time
info.why_description: Meetings are one of the largest hidden expenses in any organization. By visualizing the real-time cost, teams can make more conscious decisions about meeting necessity, duration, and attendance.
info.formula: Per Person: Cost = Hourly Rate ÷ 3,600 × Seconds Elapsed. Total = Sum of all.

footer.made_with: Built to save your company money

policy.title: Terms of Use
policy.usage_desc: MeetingCost.team is a free online tool for calculating real-time meeting costs. You may use this tool for personal or commercial purposes. We are not responsible for decisions made based on the calculations provided.
policy.disclaimer_desc: This tool is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The calculations are estimates based on the hourly rates you provide and do not constitute financial advice.
policy.changes_desc: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.data_desc: MeetingCost.team does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data. All meeting calculations are performed entirely in your browser. No salary, name, or meeting data ever leaves your device.
privacy.cookies_desc: We use essential cookies for language preferences. This site also uses Google AdSense, which may set cookies for ad personalization. See Google's Privacy Policy for details.
privacy.third_party_desc: This site uses Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google may use cookies to serve ads based on your interests. You can opt out via Google's Ad Settings at adssettings.google.com.
privacy.contact_desc: If you have any questions about our privacy practices, please contact us at meetingcost.team@gmail.com.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have questions, feedback, or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Tips, insights, and best practices for productive meetings.
blog.no_posts: No articles yet. Check back soon!
